message:
Implement direct fallback degradation policy

- Add direct_connect() function that bypasses proxies and connects directly to target
- Requires allow_direct_fallback = true in config for security
- Logs warnings about bypassing proxy security controls
- Uses synthetic "direct" proxy ID for metrics tracking
- Falls back to 503 error if direct connection fails

Closes rust_proxy-skx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
